text:
• Mongotune: The overarching "agent" or system running alongside Atlas to manage performance.
• IWM (Intelligent Workload Management): The specific suite of policies within Mongotune
designed to prevent outages.
• Policy A: Query Sentinel (Kills existing long-running queries) 2 .
• Policy B: Adaptive Rate Limiter for Operations (Rejects new requests) 3 .
• Policy C: Adaptive Rate Limiter for Connections (Queues new connections) 4 .
• (Other policies include Auto-TCMalloc Tuning and Write-Blocking) 5
6 .
